<var>
$DPS$ = (Damage * Cash Shot) / (Spin Time + (Firerate * (Cash Shot--)))
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$IPS$ = Income / (Spin Time + (Firerate * (Cash Shot--)))
$IE$ = (Income + Cash Shot * Damage) / (Cash Shot * Damage)
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 550; 225; 900; 3500; 5500; 17000
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 2; ;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Headshot Practice; Gold Shot; Faster Instincts; Double Tap II; Wildest Of The West
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 5523231844; 4999425200; 5523233366; 5523234030; 5523234990
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
$DREF$ = <ref name=dps>DPS is calculated as (Damage × Cash Shot) ÷ (Spin Time + (Firerate × (Cash Shot - 1))).</ref>
$IREF$ = <ref name=ips>This is calculated as Income ÷ (Spin Time + (Firerate × (Cash Shot - 1))).</ref>
$IEREF$ = <ref name=ie>Money generated per 1 damage is calculated as (Income + Cash Shot × Damage) ÷ (Cash Shot × Damage).</ref>
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Spin Time !! Cash Shot !! Income !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency || Income Per Second$IREF$ || Income Efficiency$IEREF$
!Income Efficiency<ref>Money generated per 1 damage is calculated as (Income + Cash Shot × Damage) ÷ (Cash Shot × Damage).</ref>
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 0.35 || 1.75 || 6 || {{Money|25}} || 15 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 0.3 || 1.25 || 6 || {{Money|25}} || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || 0.3 || 1.25 || 6 || {{Money|50}} || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 15 || 0.5  || 1 || 6 || {{Money|85}} || 19 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 15 || 0.25 || 1 || 12 || {{Money|175}} || 21 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}}  || 35 || 0.25 || 1 || 12 || {{Money|325}} || 21 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|}
</div>
